approach: UVM-based constrained random verification with directed tests, supplemented by formal property verification for critical properties

test_categories.name: sanity_tests
test_categories.description: Basic functionality verification to ensure design is operational

tests.name: test_reset
tests.description: Verify reset clears FIFO, sets empty=1, full=0, count=0, pointers=0

tests.name: test_basic_write_read
tests.description: Write 4 entries sequentially, read them back, verify FIFO ordering

tests.name: test_single_write_read
tests.description: Single write followed by single read, verify data integrity

test_categories.name: flag_verification
test_categories.description: Comprehensive testing of all status flags

tests.name: test_full_flag_assertion
tests.description: Fill FIFO to DEPTH, verify full=1, count=DEPTH, write blocked

tests.name: test_full_flag_deassertion
tests.description: From full state, read one entry, verify full=0, count=DEPTH-1

tests.name: test_empty_flag_assertion
tests.description: Empty FIFO completely, verify empty=1, count=0, read blocked

tests.name: test_empty_flag_deassertion
tests.description: From empty state, write one entry, verify empty=0, count=1

tests.name: test_almost_full_flag
tests.description: Fill to DEPTH-1, verify almost_full=1, write one more, verify almost_full=0 and full=1

tests.name: test_almost_empty_flag
tests.description: Write 2 entries, read 1, verify almost_empty=1, read 1 more, verify almost_empty=0 and empty=1

tests.name: test_flag_mutual_exclusion
tests.description: Verify full and empty never asserted simultaneously throughout random operations

tests.name: test_flag_coherency
tests.description: Verify all flags consistent with count value at all times

test_categories.name: count_verification
test_categories.description: Verify count signal accuracy and transitions

tests.name: test_count_increment
tests.description: Verify count increments by 1 on each write-only operation

tests.name: test_count_decrement
tests.description: Verify count decrements by 1 on each read-only operation

tests.name: test_count_stable_simul_rw
tests.description: Verify count unchanged during simultaneous R/W in normal state

tests.name: test_count_all_values
tests.description: Exercise all count values from 0 to DEPTH

tests.name: test_count_bounds
tests.description: Verify count never exceeds DEPTH or goes below 0

tests.name: test_count_transitions
tests.description: Verify count changes by at most ±1 per cycle

test_categories.name: simultaneous_operations
test_categories.description: Test simultaneous read/write operations in all states

tests.name: test_simul_rw_when_empty
tests.description: Assert wr_en and rd_en when empty, verify only write occurs, count=1

tests.name: test_simul_rw_when_full
tests.description: Assert wr_en and rd_en when full, verify only read occurs, count=DEPTH-1

tests.name: test_simul_rw_normal_state
tests.description: Simultaneous R/W in normal state, verify both operations complete, count unchanged

tests.name: test_simul_rw_almost_empty
tests.description: Simultaneous R/W when count=1, verify both operations, count=1

tests.name: test_simul_rw_almost_full
tests.description: Simultaneous R/W when count=DEPTH-1, verify both operations, count=DEPTH-1

tests.name: test_random_simul_rw
tests.description: Random mix of simultaneous operations at various fill levels

test_categories.name: boundary_conditions
test_categories.description: Test critical boundary and corner cases

tests.name: test_write_when_full
tests.description: Attempt writes when full=1 without reads, verify ignored, no corruption

tests.name: test_read_when_empty
tests.description: Attempt reads when empty=1 without writes, verify ignored, rd_data stable

tests.name: test_single_entry_operation
tests.description: Test all operations when count=1 (almost_empty state)

tests.name: test_almost_full_boundary
tests.description: Test transitions around count=DEPTH-1 boundary

tests.name: test_almost_empty_boundary
tests.description: Test transitions around count=1 boundary

tests.name: test_sustained_full
tests.description: Hold FIFO in full state for 100+ cycles with continuous write attempts

tests.name: test_sustained_empty
tests.description: Hold FIFO in empty state for 100+ cycles with continuous read attempts

test_categories.name: pointer_management
test_categories.description: Verify read/write pointer behavior and wraparound

tests.name: test_write_pointer_wraparound
tests.description: Write DEPTH entries, verify wr_ptr wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0

tests.name: test_read_pointer_wraparound
tests.description: Fill FIFO, read DEPTH entries, verify rd_ptr wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0

tests.name: test_pointer_collision_empty
tests.description: Verify correct behavior when pointers equal in empty state

tests.name: test_pointer_collision_full
tests.description: Verify correct behavior when pointers equal in full state

tests.name: test_multiple_wraparounds
tests.description: Perform multiple complete wraparound cycles, verify data integrity

tests.name: test_pointer_bounds
tests.description: Verify pointers always stay within [0, DEPTH-1] range

test_categories.name: data_integrity
test_categories.description: Verify data is stored and retrieved correctly

tests.name: test_fifo_ordering
tests.description: Write known sequence, read back, verify FIFO ordering maintained

tests.name: test_data_pattern_all_zeros
tests.description: Write/read all zeros pattern, verify no corruption

tests.name: test_data_pattern_all_ones
tests.description: Write/read all ones pattern, verify no corruption

tests.name: test_data_pattern_alternating
tests.description: Write/read alternating 01/10 patterns, verify no corruption

tests.name: test_data_pattern_walking_ones
tests.description: Write/read walking ones pattern, verify no bit corruption

tests.name: test_data_pattern_walking_zeros
tests.description: Write/read walking zeros pattern, verify no bit corruption

tests.name: test_random_data_integrity
tests.description: Write random data, read back, verify exact match using scoreboard

tests.name: test_data_across_wraparound
tests.description: Verify data integrity across pointer wraparound boundaries

test_categories.name: reset_scenarios
test_categories.description: Test reset behavior in various conditions

tests.name: test_reset_when_empty
tests.description: Apply reset when FIFO empty, verify clean recovery

tests.name: test_reset_when_full
tests.description: Apply reset when FIFO full, verify clean recovery

tests.name: test_reset_during_write
tests.description: Assert reset during active write operation, verify recovery

tests.name: test_reset_during_read
tests.description: Assert reset during active read operation, verify recovery

tests.name: test_reset_during_simul_rw
tests.description: Assert reset during simultaneous R/W, verify recovery

tests.name: test_async_reset_timing
tests.description: Apply reset at various clock phases, verify proper synchronization

tests.name: test_multiple_resets
tests.description: Apply multiple reset sequences, verify consistent behavior

test_categories.name: back_to_back_operations
test_categories.description: Test consecutive operations without idle cycles

tests.name: test_back_to_back_writes
tests.description: Perform DEPTH consecutive writes, verify all stored correctly

tests.name: test_back_to_back_reads
tests.description: Perform DEPTH consecutive reads, verify all retrieved correctly

tests.name: test_continuous_write_stream
tests.description: Continuous writes for 1000+ cycles with intermittent reads

tests.name: test_continuous_read_stream
tests.description: Continuous reads for 1000+ cycles with intermittent writes

tests.name: test_alternating_single_rw
tests.description: Alternate single write and single read for many cycles

tests.name: test_empty_to_almost_empty
tests.description: Transition from EMPTY to ALMOST_EMPTY state, verify flags

tests.name: test_almost_empty_to_normal
tests.description: Transition from ALMOST_EMPTY to NORMAL state, verify flags

tests.name: test_normal_to_almost_full
tests.description: Transition from NORMAL to ALMOST_FULL state, verify flags

tests.name: test_almost_full_to_full
tests.description: Transition from ALMOST_FULL to FULL state, verify flags

tests.name: test_full_to_almost_full
tests.description: Transition from FULL to ALMOST_FULL state, verify flags

tests.name: test_rapid_state_transitions
tests.description: Rapidly cycle through all states, verify no glitches

tests.name: test_all_state_coverage
tests.description: Exercise all valid state transitions in FSM

tests.name: test_minimum_depth
tests.description: Test with DEPTH=2, verify all functionality

tests.name: test_power_of_2_depths
tests.description: Test with DEPTH=4,8,16,32,64, verify correct operation

tests.name: test_non_power_of_2_depths
tests.description: Test with DEPTH=10,17,31, verify pointer wraparound

tests.name: test_large_depth
tests.description: Test with DEPTH=256, verify scalability

tests.name: test_minimum_data_width
tests.description: Test with DATA_WIDTH=1, verify functionality

tests.name: test_standard_data_widths
tests.description: Test with DATA_WIDTH=8,16,32,64, verify storage

tests.name: test_large_data_width
tests.description: Test with DATA_WIDTH=128,256, verify no width-related issues

tests.name: test_random_operations_short
tests.description: 1000 random operations with constrained stimulus

tests.name: test_random_operations_long
tests.description: 10000+ random operations, verify no failures

tests.name: test_rapid_fill_empty_cycles
tests.description: Rapidly alternate between filling and emptying FIFO

tests.name: test_random_simul_rw_heavy
tests.description: High percentage of simultaneous R/W operations

tests.name: test_corner_case_stress
tests.description: Weighted random to hit corner cases frequently

tests.name: test_output_synchronous
tests.description: Verify all outputs update on rising clock edge only

tests.name: test_flag_timing
tests.description: Verify flags update same cycle as count changes

tests.name: test_no_combinational_paths
tests.description: Verify no combinational paths from inputs to outputs

tests.name: test_setup_hold_margins
tests.description: Test with inputs changing near clock edge

assertions.name: assert_full_flag_correct
assertions.description: Full flag asserted if and only if count equals DEPTH
assertions.sva_template: property p_full_flag; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) full == (count == DEPTH); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_empty_flag_correct
assertions.description: Empty flag asserted if and only if count equals 0
assertions.sva_template: property p_empty_flag; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) empty == (count == 0); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_full_correct
assertions.description: Almost full flag asserted if and only if count equals DEPTH-1
assertions.sva_template: property p_almost_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_full == (count == DEPTH-1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_empty_correct
assertions.description: Almost empty flag asserted if and only if count equals 1
assertions.sva_template: property p_almost_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_empty == (count == 1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_bounds
assertions.description: Count never exceeds DEPTH or goes below 0
assertions.sva_template: property p_count_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count >= 0) && (count <= DEPTH); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_transition
assertions.description: Count changes by at most ±1 per cycle
assertions.sva_template: property p_count_transition; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count - $past(count)) inside {-1, 0, 1}; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_mutual_exclusion
assertions.description: Full and empty never asserted simultaneously
assertions.sva_template: property p_mutual_exclusion; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) !(full && empty); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_no_write_when_full
assertions.description: Write pointer does not advance when full without simultaneous read
assertions.sva_template: property p_no_write_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (full && wr_en && !rd_en) |=> (wr_ptr == $past(wr_ptr)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_no_read_when_empty
assertions.description: Read pointer does not advance when empty without simultaneous write
assertions.sva_template: property p_no_read_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && rd_en && !wr_en) |=> (rd_ptr == $past(rd_ptr)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_increment_write
assertions.description: Count increments by 1 on write-only when not full
assertions.sva_template: property p_count_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en && !rd_en && !full) |=> (count == $past(count) + 1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_decrement_read
assertions.description: Count decrements by 1 on read-only when not empty
assertions.sva_template: property p_count_dec; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_en && !wr_en && !empty) |=> (count == $past(count) - 1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_stable_simul_rw
assertions.description: Count unchanged on simultaneous R/W in normal state
assertions.sva_template: property p_count_stable; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en && rd_en && !empty && !full) |=> (count == $past(count)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_reset_clears_fifo
assertions.description: Reset clears FIFO to empty state with count=0
assertions.sva_template: property p_reset; @(posedge clk) !rst_n |=> (empty && !full && count == 0); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_wr_ptr_wraparound
assertions.description: Write pointer wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0
assertions.sva_template: property p_wr_wrap; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_ptr == DEPTH-1 && wr_valid) |=> (wr_ptr == 0); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_rd_ptr_wraparound
assertions.description: Read pointer wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0
assertions.sva_template: property p_rd_wrap; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_ptr == DEPTH-1 && rd_valid) |=> (rd_ptr == 0); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_wr_ptr_bounds
assertions.description: Write pointer stays within valid range [0, DEPTH-1]
assertions.sva_template: property p_wr_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) wr_ptr < DEPTH; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_rd_ptr_bounds
assertions.description: Read pointer stays within valid range [0, DEPTH-1]
assertions.sva_template: property p_rd_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) rd_ptr < DEPTH; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_simul_rw_empty
assertions.description: Simultaneous R/W when empty performs write only
assertions.sva_template: property p_simul_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && wr_en && rd_en) |=> (count == 1 && !empty); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_simul_rw_full
assertions.description: Simultaneous R/W when full performs read only
assertions.sva_template: property p_simul_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (full && wr_en && rd_en) |=> (count == DEPTH-1 && !full); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_full_implies_not_empty
assertions.description: If full is asserted, empty must be deasserted
assertions.sva_template: property p_full_not_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) full |-> !empty; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_empty_implies_not_full
assertions.description: If empty is asserted, full must be deasserted
assertions.sva_template: property p_empty_not_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) empty |-> !full; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_full_implies_not_empty
assertions.description: If almost_full is asserted, empty must be deasserted
assertions.sva_template: property p_afull_not_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_full |-> !empty; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_empty_implies_not_full
assertions.description: If almost_empty is asserted, full must be deasserted
assertions.sva_template: property p_aempty_not_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_empty |-> !full; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_wr_valid_definition
assertions.description: Write valid signal correctly defined
assertions.sva_template: property p_wr_valid; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) wr_valid == ((wr_en && !full) || (wr_en && rd_en && empty)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_rd_valid_definition
assertions.description: Read valid signal correctly defined
assertions.sva_template: property p_rd_valid; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) rd_valid == ((rd_en && !empty) || (wr_en && rd_en && full)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_data_stable_when_empty
assertions.description: Read data remains stable when empty and no write occurs
assertions.sva_template: property p_data_stable; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && !wr_en) |=> (rd_data == $past(rd_data)); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_flag_update_timing
assertions.description: Flags update synchronously with count changes
assertions.sva_template: property p_flag_timing; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count != $past(count)) |-> (full != $past(full)) || (empty != $past(empty)) || (almost_full != $past(almost_full)) || (almost_empty != $past(almost_empty)) || (count == $past(count) + 1) || (count == $past(count) - 1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_no_overflow
assertions.description: Count never exceeds DEPTH (overflow protection)
assertions.sva_template: property p_no_overflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) count <= DEPTH; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_no_underflow
assertions.description: Count never goes below 0 (underflow protection)
assertions.sva_template: property p_no_underflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) count >= 0; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_write_increments_ptr
assertions.description: Valid write increments write pointer
assertions.sva_template: property p_wr_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_valid && wr_ptr != DEPTH-1) |=> (wr_ptr == $past(wr_ptr) + 1); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_read_increments_ptr
assertions.description: Valid read increments read pointer
assertions.sva_template: property p_rd_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_valid && rd_ptr != DEPTH-1) |=> (rd_ptr == $past(rd_ptr) + 1); endproperty

covergroups.name: cg_count_values
covergroups.description: Cover all possible count values from 0 to DEPTH
coverpoints: cp_count: count with bins for each value [0:DEPTH]

covergroups.name: cg_flag_states
crosses: cross_flags: cp_full X cp_empty X cp_almost_full X cp_almost_empty (with illegal_bins for full && empty)

covergroups.name: cg_operations
covergroups.description: Cover all operation types in all states

covergroups.name: cg_state_transitions
covergroups.description: Cover all valid FSM state transitions
crosses: cross_transitions: cp_state_from X cp_state_to (with bins for valid transitions only)

covergroups.name: cg_boundary_conditions
coverpoints: cp_boundaries: {COUNT_0_TO_1, COUNT_1_TO_0, COUNT_1_TO_2, COUNT_2_TO_1, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_2_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_1, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_1_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_2, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_1_TO_DEPTH, COUNT_DEPTH_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_1}

covergroups.name: cg_corner_cases
coverpoints: cp_corner: {WRITE_WHEN_FULL, READ_WHEN_EMPTY, SIMUL_RW_FULL, SIMUL_RW_EMPTY, WR_PTR_WRAP, RD_PTR_WRAP, RESET_DURING_WRITE, RESET_DURING_READ, BACK_TO_BACK_WR, BACK_TO_BACK_RD, SUSTAINED_FULL, SUSTAINED_EMPTY}

covergroups.name: cg_data_patterns
covergroups.description: Cover various data patterns written to FIFO
coverpoints: cp_data_pattern: {ALL_ZEROS, ALL_ONES, ALTERNATING_01, ALTERNATING_10, WALKING_ONES, WALKING_ZEROS, RANDOM}

covergroups.name: cg_pointer_values
covergroups.description: Cover all pointer values and relationships
coverpoints: cp_wr_ptr: wr_ptr with bins for each value [0:DEPTH-1]
cp_rd_ptr: rd_ptr with bins for each value [0:DEPTH-1]

covergroups.name: cg_count_changes
covergroups.description: Cover all types of count changes

covergroups.name: cg_reset_scenarios
coverpoints: cp_reset_state: {RESET_WHEN_EMPTY, RESET_WHEN_FULL, RESET_WHEN_PARTIAL, RESET_DURING_WRITE, RESET_DURING_READ, RESET_DURING_SIMUL_RW}

covergroups.name: cg_simultaneous_rw
covergroups.description: Cover simultaneous R/W in all states

covergroups.name: cg_flag_transitions
covergroups.description: Cover flag assertion and deassertion events

constrained_random: constraint_respect_full: When full=1, constrain wr_en to allow only simultaneous R/W or read-only
constraint_respect_empty: When empty=1, constrain rd_en to allow only simultaneous R/W or write-only
constraint_weighted_operations: Weight operations - write_only: 40%, read_only: 40%, simul_rw: 15%, no_op: 5%
constraint_data_patterns: Periodically inject specific data patterns (all 0s, all 1s, walking patterns)
constraint_burst_operations: Generate bursts of consecutive writes or reads
constraint_state_coverage: Weight stimulus to hit underrepresented states
constraint_corner_case_injection: Periodically force corner case scenarios
constraint_count_distribution: Ensure uniform distribution across all count values
constraint_pointer_wraparound: Force scenarios that cause pointer wraparound
constraint_flag_boundaries: Target operations near flag transition boundaries
directed_scenarios: scenario_fill_and_empty: Fill FIFO completely, then empty completely
scenario_single_entry: Write one entry, read one entry, repeat
scenario_ping_pong: Alternate between almost_empty and almost_full states
scenario_sustained_full: Hold FIFO full for extended period
scenario_sustained_empty: Hold FIFO empty for extended period
scenario_wraparound_stress: Force multiple complete wraparound cycles
scenario_reset_recovery: Apply reset at various fill levels and verify recovery
scenario_simultaneous_rw_sweep: Test simultaneous R/W at each count value
scenario_boundary_walk: Step through each boundary condition systematically
scenario_data_integrity_check: Write known sequence, read back, verify ordering
scenario_flag_coherency_check: Monitor flag consistency throughout operations
scenario_rapid_transitions: Rapidly cycle between empty and full states
scenario_back_to_back_max: Maximum length back-to-back write/read sequences
scenario_pointer_collision: Force pointer equality in both empty and full states
scenario_count_verification: Verify count accuracy through all transitions

properties_to_prove: All safety assertions (flag correctness, count bounds, mutual exclusion)
Data integrity properties (FIFO ordering, no corruption)
assumptions: Input signals are stable at clock edge

bounded_model_checking.depth: DEPTH * 3 cycles to cover multiple wraparounds

reference_model.description: Maintain reference queue that mirrors FIFO contents
operations: On write: push data to queue if not full
On read: pop data from queue if not empty
On simultaneous R/W: handle based on state
Compare DUT read data against queue front
Verify DUT count matches queue size
Verify DUT flags match queue state

bug_detection_goals.flag_logic_bugs: Detect incorrect flag assertions, timing issues
bug_detection_goals.protocol_bugs: Detect invalid operations, state machine errors
